_meta.roleModel: Platform: admin | user. Workspace: owner | manager | member. See docs/roles-and-permissions.md.
_meta.defaultPasswordNote: All accounts use defaultPassword unless changed locally.
_meta.note: Dense demo data for UI — re-seed all services after pull.

users.bio: Platform admin — infra, CI/CD, gateway. Workspace owner of Infra Ops.
User A — workspace owner (CollabSpace Demo). Auth & user APIs.
User B — member in Demo; owner of Product Lab. Frontend lead.
Platform admin — tasks, notifications, /admin/* APIs.
Platform user + Demo workspace member (stakeholder read-heavy flows).
QA engineer — regression, board moves, notification checks.
Backend developer in Product Lab; good for assignee & comment tests.
Product manager in Demo + Product Lab — triage and unassigned tasks.
Design system owner in Product Lab.
Single-member workspace — tests owner-only flows in isolation.
Platform user — no workspace yet (empty state / onboarding UI).
Has account but only a pending workspace invite — tests /invitations/me accept flow.
Frontend developer — good for assignee & mention variety.
Backend developer — useful for workspace manager/member interactions.
QA-friendly engineer — covers a different persona in the demo.
QA engineer — board regression and notification checks.
Product manager — helps with unassigned task triage variety.
Designer — covers UI/UX tasks and mention scenarios.
Regular member — increases workspace member density for UI.
Platform user — member in Infra Ops for directory/board density.
